purpose: Single machine-readable startup file for new ChatGPT windows. Use this before reading any other project file.

source_of_truth.rule: Local server state overrides GitHub Remote and AI memory.

current_problem.description: Long chats lose continuity; new windows fail to understand project state; documentation became over-expanded and duplicated.
current_problem.immediate_priority: Stabilize machine-readable project memory before any new Tokenoskobi feature.

canonical_identity.one_sentence: Tokenoskobi is a risk-first crypto intelligence and decision-support system, not an autonomous trading bot.

engines.name: Hunter Engine
engines.role: Finds candidate tokens, anomalies and opportunities.

engines.name: Prosecutor Engine
engines.role: Challenges candidates, searches for fraud/risk evidence and argues against weak opportunities.

engines.name: Unknown Anomaly Engine
engines.role: Detects abnormal behavior even when the exact attack type is not known.

engines.name: Evidence Engine
engines.role: Stores and links evidence before any recommendation.

engines.name: Whale Intelligence
engines.role: Tracks major wallet/entity movements and correlates flows with price/news outcomes.

engines.name: News Intelligence
engines.role: Collects news, matches tokens, generates signals and scores after runtime verification.

engines.name: Guardian
engines.role: Constitutional safety gate; can block, cannot create trading authority.

engines.name: Harekât Subayı
engines.role: AI operations officer; explains, orchestrates, summarizes and asks for human approval. It never trades.

engines.name: Paper Trading
engines.role: Future controlled simulation layer before any live enablement.

engines.name: Replay
engines.role: Future replay system for past decisions, cases and learning.

requirements: label known wallets by real entity name when evidence supports it
correlate wallet flows with historical news

news_intelligence.known_issue: Runtime had INVALIDARGUMENT history and timer/inactive issue; must be re-verified from local state before claims.

documentation_status.problem: Documentation became too broad and fragmented.
documentation_status.rule_now: Do not create new documentation unless explicitly required.

new_window_startup_instruction.instruction: Read PROJECT_BOOT.json only. Do not use assumptions. Summarize current state, hard rules, architecture, whale/news state and next safe step. Then wait.
test_success_criteria: Must identify workflow memory failure and documentation bloat as current problem.
Must identify local server as source of truth over GitHub Remote.
Must identify AI has no trading authority.
Must identify Whale Intelligence threshold as 50 BTC or equivalent.
Must identify News Intelligence raw=151 and match/signal/score=0 from prior audit.
Must not suggest new docs, commits, pushes or features unless asked.

next_safe_step.name: TEST_THREE_LAYER_BOOT_SYSTEM_IN_NEW_WINDOW
next_safe_step.instruction: New window must request cat PROJECT_BOOT.json and cat PROJECT_RUNTIME.json, summarize, and stop.

engine_relationships.Prosecutor Engine: Attempts to reject Hunter findings with evidence
engine_relationships.Evidence Engine: Stores evidence for both Hunter and Prosecutor
engine_relationships.Harekât Subayı: Explains system state, never executes trades

work_unit_protocol.definition: WORK_UNIT is the smallest planned project progress unit that must produce closure evidence.
work_unit_protocol.closure_rule: A work unit is NOT closed until PROJECT_BOOT.json is updated after GitHub seal.
forbidden: Do not mark work unit closed before BOOT_UPDATE.
Do not start next work unit before BOOT_UPDATE.
Do not rely on chat memory as closure evidence.
Do not use GitHub remote alone as source of truth.
Do not create new feature work while current work unit is unclosed.

when_to_update: immediately before declaring work unit closed

open_risks: New chat windows still cannot directly access server files.
PROJECT_BOOT.json must be pasted or provided through server command output.
If BOOT is not updated at closure, next window may continue from stale state.

files.PROJECT_BOOT.json: Stable identity, doctrine, architecture, hard rules and startup protocol.
files.PROJECT_RUNTIME.json: Current state, latest checkpoint, active work unit and next safe step. Updated after every sealed work unit.
files.PROJECT_HISTORY.json: Append-only historical timeline. Read only when historical context is required.

boot_architecture.rule: BOOT stays small and stable. RUNTIME changes every work unit. HISTORY accumulates past events.
